title: Why Am I Here?: stay intentional while you browse
description: A free Chrome extension. Set a browsing goal, track tab alignment and active time, and get gentle distraction and rabbit-hole nudges. Private and local.
ogImageAlt: Why Am I Here? — a teal question mark extension icon

privacy.title: Privacy Policy for Why Am I Here?
privacy.description: How Why Am I Here? handles your data. Local only, no accounts, no cloud. Tab titles and URLs only while a goal is active.
